name: morph-search-panel
description: A search icon that morphs into a command menu: the surface springs between the icon and a full panel while the Button and the panel swap through AnimatePresence, so both get a real enter and exit. Inside, the ibirdui Input, a DataList of suggestions (first row highlighted), a Separator and a row of Badge filter chips stagger in on open and reverse-stagger out on close. Escape closes it like a real command menu, and the whole morph collapses to a plain crossfade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Collapsed, the block is an icon Button with an explicit aria-label ("Open search"), so it is keyboard- and screen-reader-reachable
On open, focus moves to the labelled search Input; Escape closes the panel
The selected suggestion and the active filter chip are not distinguished by colour alone — each carries aria-current plus a visually-hidden "(selected)" label
The suggestions render through DataList (a labelled list) and the filters are grouped with an accessible group label; decorative icons are aria-hidden
The size/stagger morph respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionConfig, collapsing to a plain crossfade

intents: a search icon that expands into a command menu or search panel
a shared-element morph from a search button to a results panel
an animated command palette trigger built on ibirdui
